memoryArtifacts.headline: WARBURTON FAMILY HISTORY FOLLOWS:
memoryArtifacts.description: ALICE WARBURTON was born about 1570 of Warburton, Cheshire, England, to Peter Warburton (1542-1626) and Mary Holcroft (1540-1595.)  She married Charles White about 1588 of Pontypool, Monmouthshire, Wa …

zh.Over Peover, Knutsford, Cheshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Piers Warburton於1423年出生時，他的父親Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton25歲，母親Ellen Leigh Bruyn22歲。他於1439年與Elizabeth Mainwaring在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1495年在英國英格蘭爾阿爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Piers Warburton于1423年出生时，他的父亲Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton25岁，母亲Ellen Leigh Bruyn22岁。他于1439年与Elizabeth Mainwaring在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1495年在英国英格兰爾阿爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

en.lifeSummary: When Piers Warburton was born in 1423, his father, Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton, was 25 and his mother, Ellen Leigh Bruyn, was 22. He married Elizabeth Mainwaring in 1439, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1495, in Arley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Piers Warburton est né en 1423, son père, Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ellen Leigh Bruyn, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mainwaring en 1439, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1495, à Arley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Piers Warburtonが1423年に生まれた時，父Geoffrey Egerton de Warburtonは25歳，母Ellen Leigh Bruynは22歳であった。1439年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーでElizabeth Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1495年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルリーで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Piers Warburton(이)가 1423년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Leigh Bruyn(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버에서 Elizabeth Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알리에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mainwaring em 1439, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Piers Warburton родился в 1423 г., его отцу по имени Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Leigh Bruyn, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mainwaring в 1439 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1495 г. в местности арли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
